response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js work shows system-level competence, but the absence of proven C++ in commercial routing systems and minimal evidence of geospatial data tiling or real-time traffic integration raises significant gaps.
strengths: Proven geospatial project experience via open-source GISCollective
Strong systems-level programming with DLang and low-latency backend work
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or navigation systems
Lack of evidence in distributed systems for routing tile pipelines or data consistency at scale
Minimal exposure to geospatial data tiling, map optimization, or real-time traffic integration
